essential.name: Telemetry - Disable
essential.description: Stops Windows from sending diagnostic and usage data to Microsoft.

essential.name: Activity History - Disable
essential.description: Disables Windows activity history and timeline feature.

essential.name: Location Tracking - Disable
essential.description: Prevents Windows and apps from accessing your device location.

essential.name: Hibernation - Disable
essential.description: Disables hibernate to free up disk space equal to installed RAM.

essential.name: ConsumerFeatures - Disable
essential.description: Disables Microsoft consumer features like app suggestions and spotlight ads.

essential.name: Temporary Files - Remove
essential.description: Clears temp folders to free disk space. Safe to run anytime.

essential.name: End Task Right-Click - Enable
essential.description: Adds End Task option when right-clicking taskbar app buttons (Windows 11).

essential.name: Widgets - Disable
essential.description: Removes the Widgets button from the taskbar.

essential.name: Store Recommended Search Results - Disable
essential.description: Stops Microsoft Store app suggestions appearing in Start menu search.

essential.name: PowerShell 7 Telemetry - Disable
essential.description: Opts out of PowerShell 7 telemetry data collection.

essential.name: File Explorer Auto Folder Discovery - Disable
essential.description: Prevents File Explorer from automatically adjusting folder view based on content.

essential.name: Windows Platform Binary Table (WPBT) - Disable
essential.description: Disables WPBT which allows OEM/BIOS to install software silently.
essential.apply: If (!(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Memory Management')) { New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Memory Management' -Force | Out-Null }; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SYSTEM\CurrentControlSet\Control\Session Manager\Memory Management' -Name 'DisableWPBT' -Value 1 -Force

advanced.name: Microsoft Copilot - Disable
advanced.description: Disables Microsoft Copilot AI assistant. Recommended for business machines.

advanced.name: File Explorer Gallery - Disable
advanced.description: Removes the Gallery item from the File Explorer left navigation pane.

advanced.name: Visual Effects - Best Performance
advanced.description: Turns off animations and visual effects for maximum performance.

advanced.name: Xbox & Gaming Components - Remove
advanced.description: Removes Xbox apps and gaming overlay. Recommended for business machines.

advanced.name: Teredo - Disable
advanced.description: Disables Teredo IPv6 tunneling. Reduces network overhead on IPv4-only networks.
advanced.apply: netsh interface teredo set state disabled
advanced.undo: netsh interface teredo set state default

advanced.name: Storage Sense - Disable
advanced.description: Disables automatic disk cleanup. Useful to prevent unexpected file deletion.

advanced.name: Right-Click Menu Classic - Enable
advanced.description: Restores the full classic right-click context menu in Windows 11.

advanced.name: Microsoft Edge - Debloat
advanced.description: Disables Edge telemetry, first run experience, and sponsored content.
advanced.apply: If (!(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge')) { New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge' -Force | Out-Null }; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge' -Name 'HideFirstRunExperience' -Value 1 -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge' -Name 'MetricsReportingEnabled' -Value 0 -Force; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Edge' -Name 'SpotlightExperiencesAndRecommendationsEnabled' -Value 0 -Force

preferences.name: File Explorer File Extensions
preferences.description: Show file extensions (e.g. .txt, .exe) in File Explorer.

preferences.name: File Explorer Hidden Files
preferences.description: Show hidden files and folders in File Explorer.

preferences.name: Num Lock on Startup
preferences.description: Enable Num Lock automatically when Windows starts.

preferences.name: Sticky Keys - Disable
preferences.description: Disables the Sticky Keys prompt that appears when Shift is pressed 5 times.

preferences.name: Mouse Acceleration - Disable
preferences.description: Disables pointer precision (mouse acceleration) for consistent mouse movement.

preferences.name: Taskbar Centered Icons
preferences.description: Center taskbar icons (Windows 11). Turn off to left-align like Windows 10.

preferences.name: Taskbar Search Icon
preferences.description: Show or hide the search icon/box on the taskbar.

preferences.name: Task View Button
preferences.description: Show or hide the Task View button on the taskbar.

preferences.name: Start Menu Bing Search - Disable
preferences.description: Removes Bing web results from Start menu search.

preferences.name: Start Menu Recommendations - Disable
preferences.description: Hides recommended/suggested apps in the Start menu.

privacy.name: Diagnostic Services - Disable
privacy.description: Stops and disables DiagTrack and dmwappushservice — services that send diagnostic data to Microsoft.
privacy.apply: Stop-Service -Name 'DiagTrack' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'DiagTrack' -StartupType Disabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Service -Name 'dmwappushservice' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'dmwappushservice' -StartupType Disabled -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue
privacy.undo: Set-Service -Name 'DiagTrack' -StartupType Automatic -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name 'DiagTrack' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Set-Service -Name 'dmwappushservice' -StartupType Automatic -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Service -Name 'dmwappushservice' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue

privacy.name: Advertising ID - Disable
privacy.description: Stops personalized ads based on app usage by disabling the Windows Advertising ID.

privacy.name: Feedback Notifications - Disable
privacy.description: Removes Windows feedback prompts and survey pop-ups.
privacy.apply: If (!(Test-Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Siuf\Rules')) { New-Item -Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Siuf\Rules' -Force | Out-Null }; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKCU:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Siuf\Rules' -Name 'NumberOfSIUFInPeriod' -Value 0 -Force; If (!(Test-Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection')) { New-Item -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection' -Force | Out-Null }; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\DataCollection' -Name 'DoNotShowFeedbackNotifications' -Value 1 -Force

org.name: Auto-Restart After Updates - Disable
org.description: Prevents Windows from auto-restarting after updates when users are logged in.

org.name: Lock Screen Ads - Disable
org.description: Removes ads and suggestions from the Windows lock screen.

org.name: Startup Programs Delay - Disable
org.description: Removes the artificial startup delay for applications. Apps launch faster on boot.

performance.enable_cmd: $existing = powercfg -l | Select-String 'Ultimate Performance'; if (-not $existing) { powercfg -duplicatescheme e9a42b02-d5df-448d-aa00-03f14749eb61 | Out-Null }; $guid = (powercfg -l | Select-String 'Ultimate Performance' | Select-Object -First 1).ToString().Split()[3]; powercfg -setactive $guid; Write-Host "Ultimate Performance plan activated: $guid"
performance.disable_cmd: powercfg -setactive 381b4222-f694-41f0-9685-ff5bb260df2e; Write-Host 'Switched to Balanced power plan.'
